fato_historico: 1963: Joe Walker flies a North American X-15 to a record altitude of 106,010 meters (347,800 feet) on X-15 Flight 90. Exceeding an altitude of 100 km, this flight qualifies as a human spaceflight under international convention.
energia_do_dia: Today, your soul may feel the urge to break through atmospheric boundaries, much like a daring pilot touching the edge of the cosmos. It is a good time to consider expanding your spiritual perspective. Perhaps your dreams are ready to reach unprecedented altitudes; allow your intuition to guide you as you ascend toward your most authentic, celestial potential.
frase_do_dia: The sky is not the limit when your heart knows the way.
significado_numero: Representing the infinite loops of cosmic wisdom and eternal growth.
conselho: Trust the altitude of your dreams and keep your eyes on the stars.
